scope: Pass B expansion researched against the official FullStory Server API sitemap and endpoint pages. Covered: the legacy read streams (segments, users, events), the documented user-scoped sessions list stream, and the simple JSON write endpoints for creating/updating users and creating custom events. Excluded: async batch/stream imports and export-job polling, raw file downloads, AI/session-summary generation, beta rule management, privacy/settings administration, and destructive user deletion.

excluded.reason: single segment lookup by id; covered by the segments stream's resource shape
single user lookup by id; covered by the users stream and used for verification after create_user
deletes a user's FullStory identity data and starts an asynchronous erasure workflow; not an allow-listed reverse-ETL mutation
query-parameter variant of destructive user deletion; same operation as DELETE /v2/users/{id}
per-session event detail requires an already-known session_id; not a list-all stream and largely overlaps the events export/read surface
generates AI-ready session context text/JSON for FullStory Anywhere, not a durable resource mutation
generates an AI session summary; derived analysis output rather than syncable source data or a record mutation
retrieves generated AI summary output for one session/profile, not a stable list/detail data collection
creates FullStory Anywhere prompt/profile configuration; account-level AI feature administration
lists account-level AI summary prompt/profile configuration, not analytics event/user data
organization quota/limit metadata for operators, not syncable analytics records
creates a session annotation/comment in the FullStory UI; workflow collaboration side effect outside the user/event reverse-ETL surface
asynchronous batch import job accepting up to 50,000 users; this dialect executes synchronous one-record writes and has no async job lifecycle handling
batch-import job status polling for the excluded async import workflow
result listing for an excluded batch-import job, not a primary data collection
error listing for an excluded batch-import job
asynchronous stream import workflow requiring request tracking and status polling, not a synchronous declarative write
stream-import status polling for the excluded async import workflow
asynchronous batch import job accepting up to 50,000 events; this dialect covers the synchronous create_event endpoint instead
batch-event import job status polling for the excluded async import workflow
result listing for an excluded batch-event import job
error listing for an excluded batch-event import job
starts an asynchronous segment export whose results are fetched through the operations/export APIs; requires async job orchestration and file download handling
lists asynchronous job operation statuses for export/import workflows, not a primary analytics data stream
single async operation status lookup
cancels a running export/import operation
download/poll endpoint for an asynchronous search export, tied to the excluded async export workflow
legacy Data Export list endpoint is deprecated by FullStory; docs direct users to Segment Export API
deprecated raw Data Export download endpoint returning a JSON/gzip file payload
returns a downloadable DataExport.json file for one user, not an ordinary paginated JSON records envelope
returns a downloadable UserPagesExport.json file with raw page data, not an ordinary JSON list stream
v1 user-scoped sessions list; v2 /v2/sessions is the current covered sessions stream
v1 user lookup; current v2 users stream and detail endpoint cover user profile data
v1 set-user-properties endpoint superseded by create_user/update_user in v2
v1 set-user-events endpoint superseded by create_event in v2
v1 destructive user deletion, superseded by but equally unsafe as DELETE /v2/users/{id}
